title: Deformable DETR: Deformable Transformers for End-to-End Object Detection
summary: Introduces multi-scale deformable attention to accelerate DETR convergence and improve small-object detection.
harness_hints: Test deformable multi-scale attention when small-object recall is weak.
Compare convergence speed under the same epoch budget.

title: Sparse R-CNN: End-to-End Object Detection with Learnable Proposals
summary: Uses a fixed sparse set of learned proposal boxes and proposal features for end-to-end detection.
harness_hints: Use as a sparse-proposal baseline when dense anchors create duplicate predictions.

title: Conditional DETR for Fast Training Convergence
summary: Conditions decoder cross-attention on spatial queries to reduce DETR training time.
harness_hints: Consider conditional spatial queries when query convergence is unstable.

title: YOLOX: Exceeding YOLO Series in 2021
summary: Combines an anchor-free decoupled head, SimOTA assignment, and strong augmentation.
harness_hints: Try decoupled classification and regression heads.
Audit assignment quality before increasing model size.

title: TOOD: Task-aligned One-stage Object Detection
summary: Aligns classification and localization through a task-aligned head and sample assignment strategy.
harness_hints: Prioritize task-aligned assignment when high-confidence boxes localize poorly.

title: OTA: Optimal Transport Assignment for Object Detection
summary: Formulates label assignment as an optimal transport problem with global matching costs.
harness_hints: Use assignment-cost diagnostics before tuning loss weights independently.

title: ReDet: A Rotation-equivariant Detector for Aerial Object Detection
summary: Introduces rotation-equivariant features and rotation-invariant RoI alignment for aerial detection.
harness_hints: Compare equivariant features against rotation-only augmentation.

title: DAB-DETR: Dynamic Anchor Boxes are Better Queries for DETR
summary: Represents decoder queries as dynamic anchor boxes and iteratively refines them.
harness_hints: Use anchor-like query priors when DETR queries drift spatially.

title: DN-DETR: Accelerate DETR Training by Introducing Query DeNoising
summary: Adds noisy ground-truth query reconstruction to stabilize matching and accelerate training.
harness_hints: Add denoising objectives when matching is unstable early in training.

title: YOLOv7: Trainable Bag-of-Freebies Sets New State-of-the-Art for Real-Time Object Detectors
summary: Studies re-parameterization, auxiliary heads, and trainable bag-of-freebies.
harness_hints: Prefer train-time-only improvements when deployment latency cannot change.

title: PP-YOLOE: An Evolved Version of YOLO
summary: Combines scalable blocks, task alignment, an efficient head, and distribution focal loss.
harness_hints: Compare task-aligned assignment and DFL as a coupled recipe.

title: RTMDet: An Empirical Study of Designing Real-Time Object Detectors
summary: Provides an empirical design study of backbone, neck, head, assignment, and augmentation.
harness_hints: Use RTMDet as a checklist for balanced backbone-neck-head scaling.

title: Grounded Language-Image Pre-training
summary: Unifies object detection and phrase grounding through language-image pre-training.
harness_hints: Use text-conditioned detection only when category expansion justifies its cost.

title: Detecting Twenty-Thousand Classes Using Image-Level Supervision
summary: Expands detector vocabulary with image-level supervision and a zero-shot classifier.
harness_hints: Use weak image-level data when novel categories lack box labels.

title: Simple Open-Vocabulary Object Detection with Vision Transformers
summary: Adapts contrastive vision-language pretraining to open-vocabulary detection with text queries.
harness_hints: Use OWL-ViT as a zero-shot baseline before training a custom head.

title: Slicing Aided Hyper Inference and Fine-Tuning for Small Object Detection
summary: Uses sliced inference and fine-tuning to improve small-object recall in high-resolution images.
harness_hints: Try SAHI before retraining when misses correlate with tiny pixel area.
Track duplicate rate and latency with AP_small.

title: DINO: DETR with Improved DeNoising Anchor Boxes for End-to-End Object Detection
summary: Combines contrastive denoising, mixed query selection, and box refinement for strong DETR performance.
harness_hints: Use DINO as the reference bundle for modern DETR convergence components.

title: DETRs with Collaborative Hybrid Assignments Training
summary: Uses auxiliary heads with diverse assignment strategies to improve encoder feature learning.
harness_hints: Try diverse auxiliary assigners only after a clean baseline is established.

title: Grounding DINO: Marrying DINO with Grounded Pre-Training for Open-Set Object Detection
summary: Combines DINO with grounded language pretraining for text-prompted open-set detection.
harness_hints: Use for annotation bootstrapping, then verify pseudo-label precision per class.

title: Gold-YOLO: Efficient Object Detector via Gather-and-Distribute Mechanism
summary: Improves efficient multi-scale feature fusion through a gather-and-distribute neck.
harness_hints: Test neck changes when scale-specific AP diverges strongly.

title: DETRs Beat YOLOs on Real-Time Object Detection
summary: Introduces RT-DETR with an efficient hybrid encoder and uncertainty-minimal query selection.
harness_hints: Benchmark end-to-end latency, including NMS, against YOLO.

title: YOLOv9: Learning What You Want to Learn Using Programmable Gradient Information
summary: Introduces programmable gradient information and GELAN for efficient detection learning.
harness_hints: Require matched multi-seed evidence for gradient-path changes.

title: YOLOv10: Real-Time End-to-End Object Detection
summary: Removes NMS with consistent dual assignment and holistic efficiency-accuracy design.
harness_hints: Compare full pipeline latency and duplicate errors before replacing NMS.

title: YOLO-World: Real-Time Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Adds prompt-then-detect open-vocabulary capability to a real-time YOLO framework.
harness_hints: Cache text embeddings for fixed vocabularies and measure novel-class AP separately.

title: LW-DETR: A Transformer Replacement to YOLO for Real-Time Detection
summary: Designs a lightweight DETR with efficient projections and a shallow decoder.
harness_hints: Use as a matched real-time transformer baseline against YOLO variants.

title: D-FINE: Redefine Regression Task in DETRs as Fine-Grained Distribution Refinement
summary: Reformulates DETR box regression as iterative fine-grained distribution refinement.
harness_hints: Test distributional box regression when L1 and GIoU optimization plateaus.

title: DEIM: DETR with Improved Matching for Fast Convergence
summary: Improves DETR convergence with dense object queries and matchability-aware matching.
harness_hints: Use matchability diagnostics when positive query utilization is low.

title: YOLOv12: Attention-Centric Real-Time Object Detectors
summary: Builds an attention-centric YOLO with area attention and efficient layer aggregation.
harness_hints: Gate attention blocks by measured latency and memory, not FLOPs alone.

title: YOLOE: Real-Time Seeing Anything
summary: Extends YOLO to text, visual, and prompt-free open-vocabulary detection.
harness_hints: Choose prompt mode based on vocabulary stability.
Evaluate reparameterized closed-vocabulary latency separately.

title: MambaPSA: A Mamba-based Replacement for C2PSA in YOLO26
institution: National Taiwan University of Science and Technology
summary: Replaces an attention block in YOLO26 with a lightweight Mamba-based module and studies the efficiency-accuracy trade-off.
harness_hints: Compare CPU throughput, memory, and accuracy before adopting state-space blocks.

title: No Attention, No Problem: DPU-Aware Attention Approximation in Modern YOLO on FPGA
summary: Adapts attention-based YOLO variants to FPGA DPUs by replacing unsupported operations and approximating spatial attention.
harness_hints: Measure accuracy, power, and end-to-end FPGA latency together.

title: Why Domain Matters: Domain-Aware Benchmarking of Underwater Object Detection and Annotation Quality
summary: Introduces domain-aware labels and benchmarks for measuring domain shift, annotation quality, and detector robustness in underwater scenes.
harness_hints: Stratify validation by deployment domain before changing the model.

title: VocaDet: Sample-Driven Open-Vocabulary Object Detection and Segmentation via Visual Tokenization and Vector Database Retrieval
summary: Builds expandable visual memories from positive and negative samples for training-free open-vocabulary detection and segmentation.
harness_hints: Use sample-driven retrieval when categories change more often than model retraining is possible.

title: LOGOS: Language-guided Oriented Object Detection in Aerial Scenes
summary: Uses text prompts and prompt-modulated content queries for oriented object detection in aerial imagery.
harness_hints: Evaluate prompt-conditioned oriented detection separately on dense and sparse scenes.

title: RiO-DETR: DETR for Real-time Oriented Object Detection
institution: Nanjing University of Science and Technology
summary: Develops a real-time DETR-style detector for oriented boxes with an efficiency-focused architecture.
harness_hints: Benchmark rotated-box decoding and post-processing latency, not only AP.

title: ProCal: Inference-Time Proposal Calibration for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Calibrates proposal-level localization and classification scores at inference time to improve ranking for novel categories.
harness_hints: Inspect novel-class score calibration before retraining an open-vocabulary detector.

title: VL-DINO: Leveraging CLIP Vision-Language Knowledge for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
institution: University of Science and Technology of China
summary: Enhances DINO with CLIP visual-language features, query-guided positive samples, and object-region semantic alignment.
harness_hints: Use zero-shot and base-class AP together when evaluating language priors.

title: FlowOVD: Learning Generative Latent Flows for Zero-shot Open-vocabulary Detection
summary: Generates text-guided detector queries through a rectified-flow transport process in latent space.
harness_hints: Measure query diversity and long-tail performance before adding generative query modules.

title: OV-DEIM: Real-time DETR-Style Open-Vocabulary Object Detection with GridSynthetic Augmentation
institution: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
summary: Builds an efficient open-vocabulary detector on DEIMv2 and introduces GridSynthetic augmentation for rare categories.
harness_hints: Check rare-category AP and inference cost when testing grid composition.

title: DeCo-DETR: Decoupled Cognition DETR for Efficient Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
institution: University of Science and Technology of China
summary: Separates semantic cognition from localization using reusable semantic prototypes and decoupled training.
harness_hints: Measure text-encoder removal and zero-shot accuracy as separate trade-offs.

title: Detecting Unknown Objects via Energy-based Separation for Open World Object Detection
institution: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology
summary: Uses ETF-based unknown separation and energy-based known distinction to improve unknown discovery while reducing forgetting.
harness_hints: Report known-class retention and unknown recall separately under incremental updates.

title: AID: Pushing the Performance Boundary of Human-Aware Object Detection
summary: Introduces a precise detection framework that decouples and couples box learning according to object difficulty.

title: Tensor Factorization for Leveraging Cross-Modal Knowledge in Data-Constrained Object Detection
summary: Transfers cross-modal knowledge through tensor factorization for data-constrained multispectral detection.
harness_hints: Test whether cross-modal factorization helps when paired data are scarce.

title: Training Strategies for Object Detection with Vision Transformers
summary: Studies training and fine-tuning strategies for adapting vision transformers to object detection.
harness_hints: Ablate pretraining, augmentation, and fine-tuning schedules independently.

title: Bridging the Gap between Classification and Localization for Better Feature Alignment
summary: Aligns classification and localization representations to reduce cross-task inconsistency in dense detection.
harness_hints: Inspect whether classification confidence and localization quality become better correlated.

title: Dense Distinct Query for End-to-End Object Detection
summary: Constructs dense but distinct queries for efficient end-to-end detection without duplicate predictions.
harness_hints: Measure recall and duplicate suppression jointly when increasing query density.

title: ObjectLab: Automated Diagnosis of Mislabeled Images in Object Detection Data
summary: Automatically identifies likely annotation errors in object-detection datasets.
harness_hints: Rank suspicious labels before retraining and audit the highest-impact corrections.

title: DatasetEquity: Are All Samples Created Equal? In The Quest For Equity Within Datasets
summary: Studies unequal sample value and dataset composition effects in detection-oriented visual datasets.
harness_hints: Compare sample-selection scores against random and class-balanced subsets.

title: Focal-Stable-DINO: A Strong and Reproducible Object Detector with Public Resources
summary: Combines FocalNet and Stable-DINO into a strong detector trained with public data and reproducible recipes.
harness_hints: Use the public-data recipe as a reproducibility baseline before adding private pretraining.

title: AlignDet: Aligning Pre-training and Fine-tuning in Object Detection
summary: Aligns detector pretraining objectives with downstream fine-tuning to improve transfer.
harness_hints: Track gains across data scales to separate better transfer from longer pretraining.

title: Augmented Box Replay: Overcoming Foreground Shift for Incremental Object Detection
summary: Replays augmented object boxes to mitigate foreground shift during incremental detector updates.
harness_hints: Measure old-class retention and new-class learning separately after each increment.

title: Real-Time Flying Object Detection with YOLOv8
summary: Applies YOLOv8 to real-time flying-object detection and evaluates deployment-oriented accuracy and speed.
harness_hints: Evaluate tiny-object recall and latency on the intended camera stream.

title: Exploring the Role of Synthetic Data in Human Detection
summary: Examines how synthetic data affects low-data and few-shot human detection.
harness_hints: Sweep synthetic-to-real ratios and report transfer on real-only validation data.

title: Correlation Loss: Enforcing Correlation between Classification and Localization
summary: Adds a loss that explicitly correlates classification confidence with localization quality.
harness_hints: Plot confidence versus IoU calibration before and after adding the loss.

title: 2PCNet: Two-Phase Consistency Training for Day-to-Night Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Object Detection
summary: Uses two-phase consistency training for day-to-night unsupervised domain-adaptive detection.
harness_hints: Evaluate daytime retention alongside nighttime adaptation gains.

title: Bridging Precision and Confidence: A Train-Time Loss for Calibrating Object Detection
institution: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence
summary: Introduces a train-time loss that improves confidence calibration while preserving detection precision.
harness_hints: Report calibration error together with AP to prevent confidence-only optimization.

title: Generating Features with Increased Crop-Related Diversity for Few-Shot Object Detection
summary: Generates crop-diverse features to improve few-shot object detection generalization.
harness_hints: Compare generated-feature diversity with simple crop augmentation baselines.

title: DynamicDet: A Unified Dynamic Architecture for Object Detection
summary: Builds a unified detector whose computation adapts dynamically to image difficulty.
harness_hints: Measure per-image compute allocation, latency variance, and accuracy together.

title: One-to-Few Label Assignment for End-to-End Dense Detection
summary: Uses one-to-few assignment to balance optimization richness with duplicate-free end-to-end inference.
harness_hints: Sweep assigned positives per target and monitor duplicate predictions.

title: DINF: Dynamic Instance Noise Filter for Occluded Pedestrian Detection
summary: Filters dynamically estimated instance noise to improve pedestrian detection under occlusion.
harness_hints: Stratify evaluation by occlusion level and inspect filtered training instances.

title: Exploring Resolution and Degradation Clues as Self-Supervised Signal for Low Quality Object Detection
summary: Uses resolution and degradation prediction as self-supervised signals for low-quality detection.
harness_hints: Benchmark each degradation type separately instead of averaging all low-quality cases.

title: The Impact of Partial Occlusion on Pedestrian Detectability
summary: Quantifies how partial occlusion location and severity affect pedestrian detector performance.
harness_hints: Add controlled occlusion slices to pedestrian detector evaluation.

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Uncertainty Calibration in Pre-Trained Object Detectors
summary: Systematically evaluates confidence and localization uncertainty calibration in pretrained detectors.
harness_hints: Evaluate classification confidence and box uncertainty with separate calibration metrics.

title: BigDetection: A Large-scale Benchmark for Improved Object Detector Pre-training
summary: Unifies multiple detection datasets into a large benchmark for detector pretraining.
harness_hints: Track transfer gains per downstream dataset and class-overlap regime.

title: Proper Reuse of Image Classification Features Improves Object Detection
summary: Shows how to reuse classification-pretrained features more effectively for object detection.
harness_hints: Separate backbone initialization effects from feature-reuse architecture changes.

title: Pedestrian Detection: Domain Generalization, CNNs, Transformers and Beyond
summary: Benchmarks pedestrian detection architectures and domain-generalization behavior across datasets.
harness_hints: Use cross-dataset pedestrian evaluation rather than a single in-domain split.

title: YOLOV: Making Still Image Object Detectors Great at Video Object Detection
summary: Adds video-aware feature aggregation to strong still-image YOLO detectors.
harness_hints: Measure temporal gains against added latency and memory across clip lengths.

title: ConfMix: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Object Detection via Confidence-Based Mixing
summary: Mixes source and target regions using prediction confidence for unsupervised domain-adaptive detection.
harness_hints: Calibrate confidence thresholds before using them for region mixing.

title: A Dual Weighting Label Assignment Scheme for Object Detection
summary: Applies dual weighting to positive and negative label assignment in dense object detection.
harness_hints: Compare dual weighting with the detector's native assigner under identical augmentation.

title: DSLA: Dynamic Smooth Label Assignment for Efficient Anchor-Free Object Detection
summary: Uses dynamic smooth labels to improve assignment for efficient anchor-free detectors.
harness_hints: Inspect boundary samples where hard assignment and smooth assignment disagree.

title: DAMO-YOLO: A Report on Real-Time Object Detection Design
summary: Presents a deployment-oriented real-time detector with neural architecture search, efficient heads, and distillation.
harness_hints: Validate the full latency stack including preprocessing, postprocessing, and export backend.

title: Mutual Supervision for Dense Object Detection
summary: Uses mutually supervised classification and localization branches for dense object detection.
harness_hints: Monitor whether mutual targets improve both ranking and localization instead of only one branch.

title: Pseudo-IoU: Improving Label Assignment in Anchor-Free Object Detection
summary: Estimates pseudo IoU values to improve label assignment for anchor-free detectors.
harness_hints: Test pseudo-IoU quality against true matched IoU throughout training.

summary: Disentangles classification and localization optimization in dense object detectors.
